name: -Mouthwashing RPG-
description:
New job at Pony Express! Hope you enjoy your stay <3

[MADE FOR OC ROLEPLAY!!! YOU CAN CHOOSE WHO YOU PLAY AS :D]


-Not requested! Just thought this would be interesting to make, hope you like it!-

The full story! Though, you're included :)


[NOTES!]
It's best to speak in first person for it to not talk as you, if you do speak in third person, please do use your name to refer to yourself, as it can get confused sometimes. It's for OCs on the ship, though, with a bit of work around you can also play as any of the characters on board!

You choose your role in this, picking your specialties throughout the story. I tried my best to make it as customizable as possible!

-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI it's stolen!
creator: Wolforrex
